title: IESO Forecast Surplus Baseload Generation JSON API
description:
Report on surplus baseload generation (SBG) in Ontario by IESO. 

SBG occurs when electricity production from baseload facilities is greater than Ontario demand. Baseload is comprised of available nuclear, must-run hydro, self-scheduling, commissioning, intermittent, and variable generators. 

Published once per day by 5PM EST.

More information [here](https://www.ieso.ca/-/media/Files/IESO/uploaded/SBG/SurplusBaseloadGen_h3.pdf)
